name: energy-and-civilization
description: Vaclav Smil's comprehensive history of energy in civilization — from foraging and farming to fossil fuels and renewables, with analysis of energy density, EROEI, power density, and energy transitions.
useCase: Understanding energy as the basis of civilization, analyzing energy transitions, evaluating EROEI and power density, comprehending the biophysical foundations of society.
knownRisks: Smil is deeply skeptical of rapid energy transitions — this may conflict with optimistic technological views
Some data (energy shares, specific efficiencies) has been updated since the 2017 publication
The academic density and data-heavy approach may be overwhelming for casual readers
Smil does not provide specific policy recommendations — he provides analytic frameworks
